def positive_path_boundary_accepts_unexpanded_or_relative_input_without_normalization():
    rule_id = "path_boundary_accepts_unexpanded_or_relative_input_without_normalization"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag filesystem-facing APIs that accept relative paths or ~ forms without normalizing them before downstream use."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
